heroDesc: Final-year Computer Engineering student with a strong foundation in software development and problem-solving. Driven by the same dedication I apply as a scout leader at CNE, I stand out for my team spirit and proactivity. I am currently seeking a new professional challenge where I can grow and contribute technically.
contactDesc: I am always open to new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to contact me via LinkedIn!

REST API development with .NET, focused on backend architecture and database communication.
